creator: bane.ivosev@pmf.uns.ac.rs
text: I have a similar problem, tried on several Thinkpad's, both with iwn and iwm. After upgrade to 13.2-RELEASE wireless is working only after booting. For example, if I try to connect to another SSID and do /etc./rc.d/netif restart, then I have the same situation like Henrich, WLAN can't associate with AP anymore, with the same errors. Only a reboot helps.
